name: The Sun (Buff)
description: Units with the Buff tag are 30% more likely to appear. The first buff you cast each battle grants an extra +2 ATK and +2 DEF for 2 rounds.
notes: once_per_battle guards this so it only fires for the FIRST status applied each battle, then stays silent until EventBus.ON_BATTLE_START resets the guard for the next fight.
